layout.label: Layout
layout.desc: Arrange cells in a row (horizontal) or a 2×2 grid (vertical).

iconType.label: Icon Type
iconType.desc: Choose the icon style used for the TX/RX indicators.

byteThresholdActive.label: Activity Threshold
byteThresholdActive.desc: Traffic below this value (B/s) is shown as inactive.

fontSizeModifier.label: Font Size
fontSizeModifier.desc: Scale the text size relative to the default.

iconSizeModifier.label: Icon Size
iconSizeModifier.desc: Scale the icon size relative to the default.

useCustomFont.label: Custom Font
useCustomFont.desc: Override the default font for speed values.

customFontFamily.label: Font
customFontFamily.desc: Choose a font for the speed values.

useCustomColors.label: Custom Colors
useCustomColors.desc: Enable custom colors instead of theme defaults.

colorTx.label: TX Active
colorTx.desc: Upload icon color when above the threshold.

colorRx.label: RX Active
colorRx.desc: Download icon color when above the threshold.

colorSilent.label: Inactive
colorSilent.desc: Icon color when traffic is below the threshold.

paddingLeft.label: Padding Left
paddingLeft.desc: Padding of the content on the left.

paddingRight.label: Padding Right
paddingRight.desc: Padding of the content on the right.

columnSpacing.label: Column Spacing
columnSpacing.desc: Spacing between columns in grid layout.

rowSpacing.label: Row Spacing
rowSpacing.desc: Spacing between rows in grid layout (obsolete in horizontal layout).
